# Private AIOS workspace

We are the operator's private root: an AIOS-shaped workspace this fixture
projects into a shareable support bundle. Voice and drafting conventions live in
the references; situational state lives in context; coordination runs through the
board, registry, decisions log, and channels linked below.

This router stays thin: it names the homes and routes tasks, and holds no
instance content of its own.

## Load/skip table

| Task     | Load                | Skip       |
| -------- | ------------------- | ---------- |
| drafting | references/voice.md | board/     |
| orient   | context/state.md    | channels/  |

## Structure

Standing homes and coordination records:

- Conventions: [CONVENTIONS.md](CONVENTIONS.md)
- Sync protocol: [sync/protocol.md](sync/protocol.md)
- Architecture primer: [references/architecture.md](references/architecture.md)
- Board: [board/state.md](board/state.md)
- Registry: [registry.md](registry.md)
- Decisions log: [decisions/log.md](decisions/log.md)
- Channels: [channels/general.md](channels/general.md)
